speaker: charlie
text: Well there you have it folks, another cracking day of good news from around Australia. From those inspiring Golden Bandicoots bouncing back to gravity-bending science breakthroughs, it's been a beauty. Hope you've enjoyed soaking up some of that positive energy with us this Saturday morning.

speaker: alice
text: Thanks for joining us on ParkSyde Bright Side everyone, and a massive thanks to all those who attended dawn services today honouring our service members. Whether you're heading to the footy, enjoying this gorgeous autumn weather, or just having a quiet one at home, make it a brilliant day.

speaker: charlie
text: We'll be back Monday morning with more good news to kickstart your week. Keep being awesome Queensland, keep looking after each other and keep finding those bright sides in every day.

speaker: alice
text: From all of us at ParkSyde, have a wonderful Anzac Day weekend. Take care, stay positive, and we'll catch you soon.
